scripts.build:core: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/findx run build
scripts.build:marketing: pnpm --filter @workspace/findx-pitch-deck run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/findx-promo run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
